mapper.select: select code, name, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from system_features where code = #{code} and deleted = false
select code, name, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from system_features where deleted = false order by code asc
mapper.update: update system_features set name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where code = #{code} and deleted = false
